specs.case_material: Injected aluminum alloy top and injected ABS plastic bottom
specs.fan_control: actively controlled by the Raspberry Pi OS
specs.hdmi_source: Converted the micro HDMI of the RPi 5
specs.gpio_access: Full GPIO Access with Magnetic cover
specs.nvme_variants: Single, Dual, and Quad Drive options
specs.nvme_gen_2_ports: 1 PCIe x1 Gen2 upstream port to 2 PCIe x 1 Gen2 downstream ports
specs.zigbee_compatibility: Fully compatible with Home Assistant Operating System
specs.m2_nvme_options: SINGLE M.2 NVMe PCIe Expansion Board, DUAL M.2 NVMe PCIe Expansion Board

snapshot.description: Premium aluminium case for Raspberry Pi 5 with integrated M.2 NVMe PCIe storage support via the PCIe FPC connector. Features passive aluminium heatsink body, programmable power button, and repositioned full-size HDMI and USB-C ports. Compatible with Raspberry Pi 5 only.
features: Programmable power button with safe shutdown
All ports rear-facing for clean cable management

remarks: Added spec `audio_features` = 3.5mm audio out and mic in functionality
Added spec `audio_ports` = 3.5mm audio out and mic in
Added spec `cooling_type` = Blower type 30mm PWM actively controlled by the Raspberry Pi OS

spec `thermal_pads_included`: yes → Silicon Thermal Pads for CPU, RP1, RAM, PMIC; blue silicon thermal pads for NVMe drives
